description: Fetch bovine Aquaporin-1 (PDB: 1J4N), isolate a single monomer (Chain A), identify the two conserved NPA (Asn-Pro-Ala) motifs, and measure the distance between the side-chain amide nitrogens (ND2 atoms) of the two asparagine residues in these motifs. Create a publication-quality figure showing the internal pore with the monomer as a cartoon (use transparency or clipping planes), the two NPA asparagines as sticks, and the distance measurement visible. Save the figure to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/aqp1_npa_motifs.png. Write a structural report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/aqp1_pore_report.txt containing the exact sequence numbers of the two NPA asparagines, the measured ND2-ND2 distance in Angstroms, and a brief explanation of their functional role (e.g., preventing proton conduction via dipole reorientation).
